commit.subject: LU-9091 obd: move remaining sysfs that needs units to sysfs_memparse()
commit.message:
LU-9091 obd: move remaining sysfs that needs units to sysfs_memparse()

Move all remaining sysfs files that need to support values with
size units move them to sysfs_memparse().

Change-Id: I63592e29a1366aa9a65adf9ef0be5b17644e959a
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
